• Interactive web application exploring nuclear energy concepts
  • Covers nuclear fission, enrichment, reactor designs, and fusion
  • Features historical timeline and modern geopolitical context
  • Includes animated visualizations and particle effects
    const canvas = document.getElementById('particle-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

This interactive educational website provides a comprehensive exploration of nuclear energy, from the fundamentals of fission to the promise of fusion. The application features smooth animations, particle effects, and parallax scrolling to create an engaging learning experience. Users can explore historical developments, understand reactor mechanics, and learn about the geopolitical implications of nuclear technology through visually rich content and interactive elements.
